name: phone-at-logo-step-side-channels-into-contact
description: User gave only their email at WEB_COLLECT_CONTACT, bot moved to WEB_COLLECT_LOGO and asked for a logo. User now sends their phone in a separate message ('+15677656788'). Bot must side-channel the phone into contactPhone (so the final site has both email and phone) AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_LOGO to keep asking for the logo. Earlier behavior: phone was lost — bot replied 'I didn't catch an image' and dropped the input.
